final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for 绿联私有云 brand 618 anniversary sale e-commerce campaign.

Style/medium: bold e-commerce promotional poster, flat vector with rich layered depth, inspired by Tmall/JD.com 618 campaign visual language
Composition: vertical portrait layout, hero headline centered at top third, product/brand visual anchored in mid-section, CTA badge at bottom, generous visual hierarchy
Subject: 绿联私有云 brand identity as focal point, 618 anniversary celebration theme with festive energy
Scene/backdrop: deep tech-blue or gradient dark background with glowing light burst / radial rays emanating from center, subtle circuit or cloud motifs
Lighting/mood: vibrant and energetic, inner glow and halo effects around key elements, celebratory and premium
Color palette: brand green (#00B578 or similar) as primary anchor, electric gold/yellow as 618 accent highlight, deep navy as background base, white for text legibility
Text (verbatim): "绿联私有云" "618" "周年庆"
Constraints: text must be legible at thumbnail size; hierarchy: 618 > 周年庆 > 绿联私有云 > supporting copy; no more than 3 typeface weights
Avoid: generic stock-photo collage, overly cluttered layout, mismatched neon rainbow palette, blurry text, watermark
